session-init.description: Initialize orchestration session state after intake and lane selection.

transition.description: Validate and apply workflow state transitions.

agent-check.description: Check whether an agent role is valid for the current session state.

tool-check.description: Check whether an abstract action is valid for the current session state.

evidence-log.description: Log validation evidence or review evidence against the active session.

blocked.description: Move a session into blocked with explicit blocker context.
